chainId.description: Network chain ID: decimal or 0x-hex integer; must not be zero

to.description: Recipient address (0x-prefixed, 20 bytes); omit for contract creation. Mixed-case: must satisfy EIP-55 checksum

value.description: Wei value to transfer: decimal or 0x-hex integer; zero allowed

data.description: 0x-prefixed hex call data or init code; "0x" for empty; max 256 KiB decoded

gasPrice.description: Gas price in wei (legacy/type-0 only): decimal or 0x-hex integer

maxFeePerGas.description: Max fee per gas in wei (EIP-1559/type-2 only): decimal or 0x-hex integer

maxPriorityFeePerGas.description: Max priority fee per gas in wei (EIP-1559/type-2 only): decimal or 0x-hex integer

accessList.description: EIP-2930 access list; must be empty in v1 (non-empty rejected)
